library.name: Basic Scene Grammar
library.description: Core scene-based grammar library for high-frequency structures, contrastive function words, and sentence frames.

items.title: because + clause
items.coreExplanation: “because + clause”用来引出一个完整从句，直接、明确说明原因：Because + 主语 + 谓语...。
items.usageNote: 口语和写作都常用；正式写作中避免用 because 开头堆叠太多句子，可改用 since/as 或调整语序。

slotSchema.label: Reason clause
slotSchema.hint: 包含主语+谓语的完整原因从句，如 “it was raining”

commonErrors: 把“because”后面接名词短语：*because the rain（应为 because of the rain 或 because it rained）
与 so 连用造成重复：*Because..., so...（二选一）
原因从句不完整：*because tired（应为 because I was tired / because of being tired）

contrasts.title: because of + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: because 后接从句；because of 后接名词/动名词短语。

contrasts.title: since + clause (reason)
contrasts.note: since 更委婉/更像“既然”，语气不如 because 直白。

contrasts.title: because of + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: since + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: as + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: I stayed home because it was raining.
examples.translation: 我待在家里，因为在下雨。

examples.sentence: Because I forgot my wallet, I couldn’t pay.
examples.translation: 因为我忘带钱包了，所以我付不了钱。
examples.note: 可放句首；正式写作注意不要连续用太多 Because 开头的句子。

templates.label: Give a direct reason
slotHints: reason_clause：完整原因从句（主语+谓语）
templates.exampleSentence: She left early because she had a meeting.
templates.exampleTranslation: 她提前走了，因为她有个会议。

items.title: since + clause (reason)
items.coreExplanation: “since + clause”表示原因，常用于把原因当作双方已知/不争的背景信息，语气比because更客观、书面一些。可放句首或句中。
items.usageNote: 注意区分时间义“since”（自从）。原因义一般不强调时间起点。

slotSchema.label: reason clause
slotSchema.hint: 用一般现在/过去说明背景原因

commonErrors: 把since误当“自从”导致时态乱用（如强行用现在完成时），但句子其实在讲原因
在需要强调强因果/回答“为什么”时仍用since，语气显得回避；这种场景更常用because
在since从句里再加so/therefore等造成重复因果（Since..., so ...）

contrasts.title: because + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: as + clause (reason)
contrasts.note: as与since都偏背景原因；as更轻、更口语一点，since更常见于推理/说明。

contrasts.title: as + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: Since you’ve already seen the report, I won’t explain it again.
examples.translation: 既然你已经看过报告了，我就不再解释一遍。
examples.note: 原因被当作双方已知的前提。

examples.sentence: We’ll start the meeting early since everyone is here.
examples.translation: 既然大家都到了，我们就早点开始会议。

templates.label: Background reason
slotHints: reason: 双方已知/可接受的原因
templates.exampleSentence: Since it’s getting late, we should leave now.
templates.exampleTranslation: 既然时间不早了，我们现在该走了。

items.title: although + clause
items.coreExplanation: 用although引导让步从句：先承认一个情况（although + 从句），后面说主要结果/观点（主句）。更偏书面、正式。
items.usageNote: although从句里要有完整主谓；不要和but同时用。可放句首（常用逗号）或句中。

slotSchema.label: Concession clause
slotSchema.hint: 完整句子：主语+谓语，如 it was raining

slotSchema.label: Main clause
slotSchema.hint: 主要结果/观点，如 we went out anyway

commonErrors: 误用although + 名词/动名词（应改为despite/in spite of）
从句不完整（缺主语或谓语）

contrasts.title: even though + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: despite + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: 后面接名词/动名词短语，不接完整从句。

contrasts.title: despite + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: Although it was raining, we went for a walk.
examples.translation: 虽然在下雨，我们还是去散步了。

examples.sentence: She accepted the offer although the salary was low.
examples.translation: 尽管薪水不高，她还是接受了这份工作。
examples.note: although从句也可放句中，通常不需要逗号。

templates.label: Basic
templates.exampleSentence: Although I was tired, I finished the report.
templates.exampleTranslation: 虽然我很累，但我还是把报告写完了。

items.title: if + present, will / can + base
items.coreExplanation: 用现在时放在 if 从句里，表示“条件一旦成立/很可能发生”，主句用 will 或 can + 动词原形说结果、决定或能力。
items.usageNote: if 从句不用 will；也可把 if 从句放句末。

slotSchema.label: if-clause (present)
slotSchema.hint: 用一般现在时/现在进行时描述条件；不要用 will

slotSchema.label: main clause (will/can + base)
slotSchema.hint: 用 will/can + 动词原形表达结果、决定或能力

commonErrors: 在 if 从句里用 will（误：If it will rain...）
两边都用将来时或两边都用现在时，导致时态不自然
主句忘记动词原形（误：will goes / can goes）

contrasts.title: unless + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: if + past, would + base
contrasts.note: 用于不太可能/假设/与现实相反的条件，更像“如果…就会…”

contrasts.title: if + past, would + base
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: If it rains tomorrow, we'll stay home.
examples.translation: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家。
examples.note: if 从句用一般现在时 rains，主句用 will 说计划/决定。

examples.sentence: If you finish early, you can leave.
examples.translation: 如果你提前完成，你就可以离开。
examples.note: 主句用 can 表示允许/能力。

templates.label: Basic
templates.exampleSentence: If we have time, we will visit the museum.
templates.exampleTranslation: 如果我们有时间，我们会去参观博物馆。
